description: Create V2 of newsletter. Incorporate Jason's feedback on language, structure, credibility. Add data points, revise summaries, restructure content sections.
Collab w/ Ed on newsletter infographics. Create skeletons for 'anatomy of workshop' funnel diagram, community breakdown. Prescribe exact content, let Ed style.
Change TikTok account name to "AI-led growth". Update profile accordingly.

Create SEO-driven video cutdowns. Use Ahrefs for keyword research. Focus on workshop content, e.g. "What is AI search?", "How to optimize for AI search". Align titles, descriptions, content to search intent.
